scripts.dev: npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && node deploy-pages.mjs --no-deploy && npx wrangler pages dev out-pages --d1 DB
scripts.db:pull: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=2a33489fabfdde7dbde620858343ae91 npx wrangler d1 export church-serve-db --remote --output=remote_db.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute church-serve-db --local --command="DROP TABLE IF EXISTS DutyAssignments; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS DutySchedules; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS ServiceItems; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Members; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Groups; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS LoginAttempts; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Admins; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Icebreakers;" && npx wrangler d1 execute church-serve-db --local --file=remote_db.sql && rm remote_db.sql
